who: paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 case filings/month
offer: For paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 case filings/month, overdue filings cause client dissatisfaction. We simplify tracking and flagging instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Overdue legal case filings leading to potential penalties and client dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for paralegals seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to paralegals with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for paralegals
try_it: Let users try case filing status tracking for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
